backstory.original: Aeon, a Goliath of exceptional intellect and charm, masterfully intertwines her skills as an Artillerist Artificer and Bard of the College of Whispers. Operating under the guise of a master tinkerer, she is, in truth, a cunning spy and manipulative puppet master. Aeon owns the renowned Greenhow, a unique tavern where patrons are served by her intricate automata, while she sells mechanical devices and curios embedded with Sending Stones and other surveillance tools; her 'gifts' have managed to make their way into some of the most powerful homes in the North Ward of Waterdeep. Her strategy is brilliantly deceptive; she portrays herself as a flamboyant performer and entertainer, so vivid and engaging that none suspect her of orchestrating a grand network of espionage, controlling events from the shadows.
backstory.display: 伊恩是一位拥有超绝智力和魅力的巨人，巧妙地将她作为炮火机关术士与低语学院吟游诗人的技巧融会贯通。在工匠大师的伪装之下，她其实是一名狡猾的间谍和玩弄人心的木偶大师。伊恩是大名鼎鼎的格林豪的老板，那是一家独特的酒馆，在那里为顾客服务的是她精巧的自动人偶，同时她还售卖镶嵌着传讯石和其他监控工具的机械装置和古玩。她的礼物已经成功进入了深水城北部区一些最具权势之人的家中。她的策略非常具有欺骗性，她假扮成一位引人注目的表演者和娱乐家，她的演技是如此逼真和引人入胜，以至于没有人怀疑她在幕后操纵着一个庞大的间谍网络，暗中控制着一切事件。

description.original: Aeon fires an energy bolt from her cane at the closest enemy for one hit.
description.display: 伊恩用拐杖向最近的敌人发射能量弹，命中一次。

description.original: Deuce deals one ultimate hit to each enemy and knocks them back.
description.display: “平手”对每个敌人造成一次杀招命中且将他们击退。

longDescription.original: Aeon's mechanical monkey Deuce deals one ultimate hit to each enemy and knocks them back a short distance.
longDescription.display: 伊恩的机械猴子“平手”对每个敌人造成一次杀招命中，且将他们击退一小段距离。

description.desc: Every week, Aeon targets one Patron for infiltration. Aeon can be used in any Patron adventure or variant for her current Patron target, even if she would not normally be available to be used due to variant or patron restrictions.
每周，伊恩会对一位赞助者进行渗透。伊恩将可用于她当前选定的赞助者的任何赞助者冒险或支线任务，即使以前由于支线任务或赞助者限制条件无法使用。

Aeon increases the damage of adjacent Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation that is eligible for the patron she is infiltrating this week, stacking multiplicatively.^Only Champions that start the adventure eligible, or Champions with equipped feats that make them eligible, will count for this ability.
阵型中每有一位勇士符合伊恩本周渗透的赞助者的限制条件，她会使相邻勇士的伤害增加 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。^只有一开始就符合冒险限制条件的勇士，或者通过装备专长而符合限制条件的勇士，才会被纳入此技能的范围。

tipText.original: Aeon increases the damage of adjacent Champions, with the buff increasing for each Champion in the formation eligible for Aeon's current patron target.
tipText.display: 伊恩会增加相邻勇士的伤害，阵型中每有一位勇士符合伊恩当前赞助者目标的限制条件，增益效果就有所增加。

description.desc: Each enemy that Aeon damages gains a Stolen Secrets stack. Enemies with a Stolen Secrets stack take $(amount)% more damage from all sources, stacking multiplicatively up to 5 times.
每名被伊恩伤害的敌人会获得一层“被窃取的秘密”堆叠。拥有一层“被窃取的秘密”堆叠的敌人受到的所有来源的伤害增加 $(amount)%，可以乘算方式堆叠最多 5 次。

tipText.original: Aeon uncovers the secrets of her enemies, causing them to take more damage from all sources for each secret she has uncovered.
tipText.display: 伊恩会揭露她敌人的秘密，她每揭露一个秘密，她就会增加敌人受到的所有来源的伤害。

description.desc: Aeon increases the effect of Inner Circle by $(amount)% for each completed patron challenge for her current Patron, stacking multiplicatively.
每完成一项伊恩当前赞助者的赞助者挑战，她会使“近卫队”的效果增加 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
Unlock $(source_hero)'s Deuce Ultimate Attack
解锁$(source_hero)的“平手”杀招攻击
Increases the effect of Inner Circle by $(not_buffed amount)% each time Uncover Weakness applies a Stolen Secrets stack, stacking additively up to 10 times per area and resetting when changing areas.
“揭露弱点”每施加一层“被窃取的秘密”堆叠，就会使“近卫队”的效果增加 $(not_buffed amount)%，每个区域可以加算方式堆叠最多 10 次，在变更区域时重置。

specializationDescription.original: Aeon concentrates on getting information quickly, good for shorter adventures
specializationDescription.display: 伊恩专注于迅速获取信息，适合较短的冒险

description.desc: Increases the effect of Inner Circle by $(not_buffed amount)% each time Uncover Weakness applies a Stolen Secrets stack, stacking additively up to 1,000,000 times and persisting until you reset the adventure.
“揭露弱点”每施加一层“被窃取的秘密”堆叠，就会使“近卫队”的效果增加 $(not_buffed amount)%，可以加算方式堆叠最多 1000000 次，并在你重置冒险前一直保持。

specializationDescription.original: Aeon seeks out comprehensive information, best for long adventures
specializationDescription.display: 伊恩寻求全面的信息，适合较长的冒险

description.desc: Cane Wand can now pierce through the targeted enemy, dealing one hit to all enemies in a line. Additionally, it deals 5 seconds of BUD-based damage to all enemies it hits.
“拐杖法杖”现在可以穿透目标敌人，对同一行中的所有敌人造成一击。此外，它会对所有被击中的敌人造成等同于 5 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Aeon improves the damage of her Cane Wand.
specializationDescription.display: 伊恩提升她“拐杖法杖”的伤害。

description.desc: Inner Circle now affects all Champions within two slots of Aeon and its pre-stack effect is increased by 75%.
“近卫队”现在会影响伊恩身边两格范围内的所有勇士，并且其堆叠前效果增加 75%。

specializationDescription.original: Aeon expands her inner circle up to include more members.
specializationDescription.display: 伊恩扩充她的近卫队，以容纳更多成员。

description.desc: Increases the pre-stack effect of Challenge Accepted by 150% while on a patron adventure/variant/free play for the week's chosen patron.
在本周选定的赞助者的赞助者冒险/支线任务/自由游戏期间，使“接受挑战”的堆叠前效果增加 150%。

specializationDescription.original: Aeon assists her current Patron on completing patron variant adventures.
specializationDescription.display: 伊恩协助她当前的赞助者完成赞助者支线任务冒险。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,100,15199,15200","description":"Increases the effect of Aeon's Immediate Infiltration and Play the Long Game specializations by $amount%"}

description.original: Yes, I am going to help, but it WILL cost you!
description.display: 好，我会帮忙的，但你得付出代价。

description.original: How about you do your jobs, or I start revealing your darkest secrets?
description.display: 你能不能做你的本职工作？不然我就要开始揭露你最黑暗的秘密了。

description.original: I guess you have your uses.
description.display: 看来你还是有些用处的。

description.original: Don't be surprised when we aren't friends next week.
description.display: 如果下周我们不是朋友了，不要感到惊讶。

description.original: Don't worry; I know where their real weak spot is.
description.display: 别担心，我知道他们真正的弱点在哪儿。

description.original: Now that folks are talking, our enemies will crumble.
description.display: 既然现在大家都在议论了，我们的敌人会崩溃的。

description.original: They have no idea how far I will go to prove I'm right.
description.display: 他们不知道我为了证明我是对的会做到何种地步。

description.original: Next time, don't mess with a professional.
description.display: 下次，别招惹一位专业人士。

description.original: Don't worry. They're playing right into our hands.
description.display: 别担心，他们正中我们的下怀。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Aeon's Immediate Infiltration and Play the Long Game specializations by $amount%
Increases the effect of Aeon's Immediate Infiltration and Play the Long Game specializations by $amount%

description.original: What were you so worried about?

effects.description: Increases the effect of Aeon's Immediate Infiltration and Play the Long Game specializations by $amount%

description.original: They must never know what we do in the shadows.
description.display: 他们绝不能知道我们在暗中做了什么。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Aeon, a Goliath of exceptional intellect and charm, masterfully intertwines her skills as an Artillerist Artificer and Bard of the College of Whispers. Operating under the guise of a master tinkerer, she is, in truth, a cunning spy and manipulative puppet master. Aeon owns the renowned Greenhow, a unique tavern where patrons are served by her intricate automata, while she sells mechanical devices and curios embedded with Sending Stones and other surveillance tools; her 'gifts' have managed to make their way into some of the most powerful homes in the North Ward of Waterdeep. Her strategy is brilliantly deceptive; she portrays herself as a flamboyant performer and entertainer, so vivid and engaging that none suspect her of orchestrating a grand network of espionage, controlling events from the shadows.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Every week, Aeon infiltrates the inner circle of one Patron and becomes eligible for all their adventures. Her buff also changes, buffing all adjacent Champions that are eligible for her current Patron target.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 伊恩是一位拥有超绝智力和魅力的巨人，巧妙地将她作为炮火机关术士与低语学院吟游诗人的技巧融会贯通。在工匠大师的伪装之下，她其实是一名狡猾的间谍和玩弄人心的木偶大师。伊恩是大名鼎鼎的格林豪的老板，那是一家独特的酒馆，在那里为顾客服务的是她精巧的自动人偶，同时她还售卖镶嵌着传讯石和其他监控工具的机械装置和古玩。她的礼物已经成功进入了深水城北部区一些最具权势之人的家中。她的策略非常具有欺骗性，她假扮成一位引人注目的表演者和娱乐家，她的演技是如此逼真和引人入胜，以至于没有人怀疑她在幕后操纵着一个庞大的间谍网络，暗中控制着一切事件。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 每周，伊恩都会渗透进一位赞助者的近卫队，并变得有资格参加该赞助者的所有冒险。她的增益也会改变，为所有符合她当前赞助者目标限制条件的相邻勇士提供增益。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: Yes, I am going to help, but it WILL cost you!

display.name: 无私
display.description: 好，我会帮忙的，但你得付出代价。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: How about you do your jobs, or I start revealing your darkest secrets?

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 你能不能做你的本职工作？不然我就要开始揭露你最黑暗的秘密了。

original.name: You'll Do
original.description: I guess you have your uses.

display.name: 你会做的
display.description: 看来你还是有些用处的。

original.name: Trusted For Now
original.description: Don't be surprised when we aren't friends next week.

display.name: 暂时可信
display.description: 如果下周我们不是朋友了，不要感到惊讶。

original.name: Word on the Street
original.description: Don't worry; I know where their real weak spot is.

display.name: 街头传言
display.description: 别担心，我知道他们真正的弱点在哪儿。

original.name: A Little Bird Said...
original.description: Now that folks are talking, our enemies will crumble.

display.name: 有传闻说……
display.description: 既然现在大家都在议论了，我们的敌人会崩溃的。

original.name: Are You Chicken?
original.description: They have no idea how far I will go to prove I'm right.

display.name: 你是胆小鬼吗？
display.description: 他们不知道我为了证明我是对的会做到何种地步。

original.name: Do You Give Up?
original.description: Next time, don't mess with a professional.

display.name: 你要放弃吗？
display.description: 下次，别招惹一位专业人士。

original.description: Don't worry. They're playing right into our hands.
